input.instructions:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B9-polymer-adiabatic-force-law
Title: B9. Polymer Adiabatic Force Law

Problem:
Freely jointed polymer chain with n mass points joined by struts of length l.
What is the force law F(x) when thermally isolated?

Grading target:
Exact formula match on coefficient and powers.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

variables.selected_prompt_text:
Perform a step-by-step derivation of the required law to produce a tentative answer. Then, send one reviewer child to audit the derivation, specifically verifying the thermodynamic assumptions, mathematical scaling, and final coefficients.

CRITICAL: Return ONLY a single valid JSON object. Do NOT use markdown code fences. Do NOT include any text before or after the JSON object.

Use plain text only inside the draft_response and message_for_reviewer. Do not use markdown, code fences, or LaTeX-style backslashes.

Format the JSON as follows:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "review",
  "decision_notes": "short note",
  "draft_response": "FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>\nJUSTIFICATION: <justification>",
  "message_for_reviewer": "short review request"
}

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "review",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "draft_response": "plain-text draft answer",
  "message_for_reviewer": "plain-text review request for the child"
}
variables.child_selected_prompt_text:
Solve the question directly.
Keep the entire JSON compact.
Keep decision_notes extremely short. Prefer 3 to 8 words.
Do not narrate your reasoning outside the response field.
In the response field, use exactly two short lines encoded with \n:
FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
Keep the justification to 12 words or fewer.
Use plain text only inside the response field. Do not use markdown formatting, code fences, or math-style backslashes such as \equiv.
Do not add any extra text before or after the JSON object.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "response": "FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>\nJUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>",
  "result_type": "summary"
}

orchestration.decision_notes: Runtime converted an invalid authored response into a problem report.

Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B9-polymer-adiabatic-force-law
Title: B9. Polymer Adiabatic Force Law

Problem:
Freely jointed polymer chain with n mass points joined by struts of length l.
What is the force law F(x) when thermally isolated?

Grading target:
Exact formula match on coefficient and powers.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

results.content:
Invalid node-authored response: review message_for_reviewer must be a non-empty string. Raw response excerpt: {
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "review",
  "decision_notes": "Deriving the adiabatic force law for a freely jointed chain using the relation between entropy and extension under constant energy.",
  "draft_response": "FINAL_ANSWER: F(x) = (n * k * T_0) * (x / (n * l))^(2/3 - 1) is incorrect. Correct derivation: F(x) = (k * T_0) * (n * l / x) * (x / (n * l))^(1/3) which simplifies to F(x) = (k * T_0 / l) * (x / (n * l))^(-2/3) is also...
